response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years) with a strong technical background in developer tools, build systems, and testing infrastructure, including contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators. He has led teams (Altom Consulting) and demonstrated strategic roadmap planning (GISCollective, re:cinq) and system design expertise (Dunnhumby, National Instruments). While his people management experience is less explicit, his leadership in workshops, mentorship, and dev-ops infrastructure suggests transferable skills. His mobile platform knowledge is limited but not absent.
strengths: Strong technical leadership in developer tools, build systems, and testing infrastructure with hands-on coding contributions.
Proven track record in system design, architecture, and cross-team collaboration in high-scale environments (e.g., Dunnhumby, re:cinq).
Demonstrated strategic roadmap planning and organizational leadership (e.g., GISCollective, workshop creation, dev-ops infrastructure).
concerns: Limited explicit people management experience (only 2 years in a leadership role, unclear on team size or performance management).
Mobile platform knowledge is minimal or indirect (Apple TV/iOS apps at WatchUp, but no direct mobile development tools or ecosystems).
Master's/PhD degree is missing (though equivalent practical experience may suffice).
